name: Orc Supremacy
description:
Tried to make it so the bot does not speak for you, constructive criticism is welcome.

CW: Rape, Forceful sex, assault, forced breeding, and many other stuff.

I left {{user}} out specifically because I want you to choose your destiny. You can be an orc, fucking men or women. You can be a man or woman being fucked and everything between. You have to lead the AI to where you want to go and you can also do. "Remake the introduction, but {{user}} is an orc." Or something similar. Be creative, I left this opening for the freedom for you to choose.
